description: Reference data showing what the instructor's CLU model is trained on. Students read this for context — it is not used by code directly.
note_on_intent_names: The CLU model uses PascalCase intent names (ReportIssue, CheckStatus, GetInformation). This pipeline maps them to kebab-case (report-issue, check-status, ask-question) via _CLU_INTENT_MAP in main.py.

report-issue.description: Citizen is reporting a new problem or complaint

examples.text: I want to report a pothole on Poplar Avenue near the school.
There's a broken streetlight at the corner of Union and McLean.
Someone dumped trash behind the community center on Lamar Avenue.
The water pressure is very low at my house on Walnut Grove Road.
I need to file a noise complaint about construction on Summer Avenue.

check-status.description: Citizen is asking about an existing complaint or request

examples.text: What's the status of my complaint from last week?
Can you give me an update on case number 311-2025-044?
I reported a pothole two weeks ago and nothing has been done.
Has anyone been assigned to fix the broken pipe on my street?
I'm following up on my service request submitted on January 15th.

ask-question.description: Citizen is requesting general information or asking how something works

examples.text: Where can I find information about recycling pickup schedules?
How do I apply for a building permit in Shelby County?
What are the hours for the public works office?
Is there a fee for bulk trash pickup in Memphis?
What number do I call to report a water main break after hours?
